data.name: CategoryNameRequired
data.value: Category name is required.

data.name: CategoryNameMaxLength
data.value: Category name cannot exceed 100 characters.

data.name: CategoryNameDuplicate
data.value: A category with this name already exists.

data.name: CategoryNotFound
data.value: Category not found.

data.name: CategoryDeleteHasChildren
data.value: Cannot delete the category because it contains subcategories.

data.name: CategoryDeleteHasProducts
data.value: Cannot delete the category because it contains associated products.

data.name: CategoryDeleteHasDescriptions
data.value: Cannot delete the category because it has associated descriptions.

data.name: CategoryDescriptionMaxLength
data.value: Category description cannot exceed 500 characters.

data.name: DescriptionTypeNameRequired
data.value: Description type name is required.

data.name: DescriptionTypeNameMaxLength
data.value: Description type name cannot exceed 100 characters.

data.name: DescriptionTypeNameDuplicate
data.value: A description type with this name already exists.

data.name: DescriptionTypeNotFound
data.value: Description type not found.

data.name: DescriptionTypeDeleteInUse
data.value: Cannot delete the description type because it is used by one or more products.

data.name: DescriptionTypeDescriptionMaxLength
data.value: Description type description cannot exceed 500 characters.

data.name: DescriptionTypeCategoriesRequired
data.value: At least one category must be selected when the description type is not global.

data.name: DescriptionValueRequired
data.value: Description value cannot be empty.

data.name: DescriptionValueMaxLength
data.value: Description value cannot exceed 500 characters.

data.name: DescriptionValueDeleteInUse
data.value: Cannot delete the value because it is associated with one or more products.

data.name: AttributeTypeNameRequired
data.value: Attribute type name is required.

data.name: AttributeTypeNameMaxLength
data.value: Attribute type name cannot exceed 100 characters.

data.name: AttributeTypeNameDuplicate
data.value: An attribute type with this name already exists.

data.name: AttributeTypeNotFound
data.value: Attribute type not found.

data.name: AttributeTypeDeleteInUse
data.value: Cannot delete the attribute type because its attributes are used by one or more products.

data.name: AttributeTypeDescriptionMaxLength
data.value: Attribute type description cannot exceed 500 characters.

data.name: AttributeNameRequired
data.value: Attribute name is required.

data.name: AttributeValueRequired
data.value: Attribute value is required.

data.name: AttributeDeleteInUse
data.value: Cannot delete the attribute because it is used by one or more products.

data.name: ProductNameRequired
data.value: Product name is required.

data.name: ProductNameMaxLength
data.value: Product name cannot exceed 200 characters.

data.name: ProductSkuRequired
data.value: Product SKU is required.

data.name: ProductSkuMaxLength
data.value: Product SKU cannot exceed 50 characters.

data.name: ProductSkuDuplicate
data.value: A product with this SKU already exists.

data.name: ProductCategoryRequired
data.value: Product must be assigned to a category.

data.name: ProductCategoryNotFound
data.value: The selected category does not exist.

data.name: ProductNotFound
data.value: Product not found.

data.name: ProductMandatoryDescriptionMissing
data.value: Mandatory description '{0}' must be provided.

data.name: CategoryDescriptionRuleAlreadyExists
data.value: This description type is already associated with this category.

data.name: CategoryDescriptionRuleNotFound
data.value: The description rule was not found for this category.

data.name: CategoryDescriptionRuleDeleteInUse
data.value: Cannot remove the description rule because products in this category have values assigned for it.
